rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tight font-bold font-serif text-slate-900
rules.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight font-semibold font-serif text-slate-900

logo.handling: Needs white rounded container (bg-white rounded-xl p-2) when placed on dark navy sections. Otherwise display normally.

cards.style: bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-slate-100 transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)]

buttons.primary: bg-teal-700 hover:bg-teal-800 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-colors font-semibold
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-800 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-colors font-semibold
buttons.outline: border-2 border-slate-900 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-colors font-semibold

animations.hero: Fade-in text and floating data cards using framer-motion. Cards should have gentle floating y-axis animations.
animations.scroll: Subtle fade-up scroll animations on section entry.
animations.hover: Cards lift slightly on hover (-translate-y-1) with increased shadow.

sections: Hero: Fade-in text, CTA, floating stat chips (24+ Years Experience, Denial Reduction Strategy, Revenue Cycle Analytics), overlaid on dark navy/teal background image.
What We Do: Side-by-side layout (Intro text + Visual).
Services: 6-card grid with icons, concise titles and descriptions.
Why Revenue Cycle IQ: Navy contrast background with white text, highlighting core benefits.
Experience That Matters: Tag grid showing expertise areas (e.g., Epic, Cerner, Denials, coding).
Approach: 4 numbered cards indicating process steps (Discovery, Analysis, Strategy, Execution).
Global CTA: Large banner encouraging to Book a Call.
Mission & Vision: Text blocks with generous spacing.
Detailed Services List: Expanded view of the 6 services from Home page.
Deep Dive into Analytics, Strategy, and Execution.
Booking Form: Name, Email, Organization, Phone, Preferred Date, Preferred Time, Message.
Contact Form: Name, Email, Organization, Message.

hero_background.description: Healthcare analytics dashboard on laptop. Use with a heavy deep navy gradient overlay (e.g., from-slate-900/90 to-slate-900/60) to ensure text contrast.

what_we_do.description: Nurse in green scrubs holding tablet and stethoscope.

services_hero.description: Computer screen with bar chart analytics.

forms.booking: Fields: Name, Email, Organization, Phone, Preferred Date, Preferred Time, Message. Use modern inputs with clear labels.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install lucide-react, framer-motion, react-router-dom, and standard Shadcn components.
Ensure global typography overrides use Playfair Display for headings and Plus Jakarta Sans for body.
Setup routing for the 6 pages (Home, About, Services, Why Revenue Cycle IQ, Book a Call, Contact).
Implement a sticky header that changes style on scroll (transparent at top, white background with shadow on scroll). Includes mobile hamburger menu.

In dark sections (like 'Why Revenue Cycle IQ' or Hero with navy overlay), WRAP the logo image in a white container (`bg-white rounded-xl p-2 inline-block`) to ensure visibility, since the logo has dark text.
Implement the Booking form with Shadcn components or styled HTML elements (use proper date/time selection UI).
Use framer-motion to create floating stat cards in the hero section.
Implement a back-to-top button in the footer or fixed to the bottom right.
Add `data-testid` to all CTA buttons, form inputs, and nav links.
